newsitems.title: Pikuniku 2 is coming in 2027!
newsitems.author: Gina Zero
newsitems.contents: Hello everyone!After 7 years since the release of Pikuniku, we’re thrilled to finally reveal Pikuniku 2!We’ve been working on it since 2023. Yup, it’s been a long time.Making a 3D sequel has been both wild and delightful!In Pikuniku 2, Piku and his friends pack a picnic and set off once more to whimsically wander through the wonderfully weird. Our story begins with an escaped sandwich and a boat wreck, and only gets odder from there. With the friends scattered across the archipelago, Piku sets off to find them and ultimately return home.We’re taking our time to experiment with new mechanics. We’ve spent a lot of time tweaking the controls, art, and design to craft a unique experience.Pikuniku has been inspired by our love for old games we never played, as well as by the dystopian reality we live in.We can’t wait to share more details about Piku’s new adventure with you!Please wishlist Pikuniku 2 if you'd like, and follow Piku on X, Bluesky, and Instagram for updates along the way.
